artists.title: Irukanji
artists.name: Ihor Orlovskyi
artists.information: The Boss.
artists.info_sc: Irukanji is Ihor Orlovskyi — musician, DJ, and owner of Sentimony Records, based in Kyiv, Ukraine.

artists.title: Zymosis
artists.name: Dmytro Likhachov
artists.information: Zymosis tracks harmoniously combines melodiousness, drive, sound depth with philosophical and dramatic content.
artists.info_sc: Working out of Kyiv under several aliases, Dmytro Likhachov keeps different creative currents alive across each project — Zymosis is one of them.

artists.title: Spectrum Vision
artists.name: Ivan Uzdyaev
artists.location: Stupino city Moscow region, Russian Federation

artists.title: Overdream
artists.name: Maxim Kurushyn
artists.info_sc: Maxim Kurushyn makes psychedelic music across a range of tempos as Overdream, based in Kyiv.

artists.title: Makus (Overdream Studio)
artists.name: Maxim Kurushyn
artists.information: High-quality sound engineer.

artists.title: Mindex
artists.name: Slava
artists.info_sc: Slava is a US-based producer and the founder of Time Resonance, working at the intersection of psychedelic sound and the psychology of music. As Mindex, he treats music as a coded medium — sine waves and zeroes translated through air into shared emotional experience.

artists.title: Zen
artists.information: Zen (Altar Records)

artists.title: Cygna
artists.name: Mario Sammut
artists.info_sc: Mario Sammut is a musician, composer, and sound designer from Malta, signed with Ultimae Records in France. Trained in classical piano and electronics engineering, he built Cygna as a vehicle for symphonic ambient compositions that bridge contemporary electronic sound with classical instruments — work that has appeared in films, theatre, and festivals including Glastonbury and Hadra.

artists.title: Swaroop Guhathakurta
artists.information: Swaroop Guhathakurta

artists.title: Dimitro (Zymosis Studio)
artists.name: Dmytro Likhachov
artists.information: High-quality sound engineer.

artists.title: Dmitry Yurchenko
artists.information: Dmitry Yurchenko (Di-StudiO)

artists.title: Juelz
artists.name: Julian Schröder
artists.style: Psytrance, Dark Progressive, Zenonesque, Neuro Hop
artists.info_sc: Julian Schröder is a music producer from Northern Germany whose sound moves between introspective downtempo and IDM to driving psytech and zenonesque soundscapes. Trained at Berlin's hdpK and a longtime drummer, he brings a percussionist's sensibility and compositional depth to his electronic work.

artists.title: Psydewise
artists.name: Sam Gamgee
artists.info_sc: Sam Gamgee makes music from the Garden Route on South Africa's southern coast — and identifies as a merry prankster as much as a producer.

artists.title: EleexR
artists.name: Dmytro Likhachov
artists.info_sc: Another outlet from Dmytro Likhachov's Kyiv-based creative world — EleexR sits alongside Zymosis, Alienapia, and others as part of the same restless production practice.

artists.title: Space Organ
artists.name: Yuri Machado
artists.info_sc: Space Organ is the project of Yuri Machado, a DJ and producer from Aracaju, Brazil. His music draws from a wide range of influences and doesn't settle into one narrow place.

artists.title: KAbi
artists.name: Tersius van Papendorp
artists.info_sc: Forest trance from Tersius van Papendorp, based in a place literally called Wilderness on South Africa's coast. Kabi is where his deeper, woodsy side lives — his other alias, Tersius, carries the rest.

artists.title: Declaration of Unity
artists.name: George Koutsourelis, Ion Solounias, John Papafilis
artists.info_sc: A collaborative project from Athens built around contemporary trance — Declaration of Unity approaches the music with an explicit focus on spirit, creativity, and positivity.

artists.title: Aesthesia
artists.name: Mikael Stathin
artists.info_sc: Named after the capacity for sensation and perception, Aesthesia is Mikael Stathin's project from Nacka, Sweden — music that takes its name seriously.

artists.title: Denni Mareta
artists.information: Denni Mareta

artists.title: Sam Wise
artists.information: Samuel J. Wise (Macro-Dot Audio)

artists.title: Artech
artists.name: Nelson Neto
artists.info_sc: Nelson Neto is a producer and drummer from Amsterdam who has been building Artech since 2007 — reaching TOP 1 on Beatport Minimal early on, and going on to release over 100 tracks and remixes alongside artists including Boris Brejcha and Sensient. The project has toured globally across Australia, Brazil, Germany, Japan, and beyond.

artists.title: VORG
artists.name: Robson Morche
artists.info_sc: VORG is Robson Morche's ongoing experiment from Brazil, built around what he calls mental reconstruction — layers of experience and texture accumulated over the years.

artists.title: Gojja
artists.name: Daniel Jansson
artists.info_sc: GOJJA is Daniel Jansson's dance-floor project, started slowly in 2009 out of a need for new creative outlets. Built on funky bass lines, crunchy sounds, and deliberate humor, it sits alongside his other projects — MakadaM, Fontanellsurfarna, Six Fingered People, and Hallucinogenic Horses among them.

artists.title: Kauyumari
artists.name: Rodrigo Diaz
artists.location: San Cristobal De Las Casas, Mexico
artists.info_sc: Rodrigo Diaz explores a psychedelic fusion of spirit and science as Kauyumari, from San Cristóbal de las Casas, Mexico.

artists.title: Diffus
artists.name: Björn Olsson
artists.info_sc: Björn Olsson has been part of Gothenburg's underground scene since the mid-90s — first as a visual artist creating UV backdrops for psytrance parties, then as the founder of Sweden's iconic Trolltyg forest gatherings (2001–2008). As Diffus he works in Dark Progressive and Forest Progressive between 136–142 BPM; his second project, Beorn, explores slower experimental terrain built on hardware synths and drum machines.

artists.title: Gaz Mask
artists.name: Felipo Justo
artists.info_sc: Felipo Justo is the Brazilian producer behind Gaz Mask, a darkprog project on Sentimony Records. Born in Linhares, Espírito Santo and based in Campinas, São Paulo, his sound takes listeners into an introspective journey — natural textures, ancestral instruments, and psyleads that evoke the experience of being part of a living forest.

artists.title: Injir
artists.name: Oleksii Salmin
artists.information: Ukrainian psytrance dj, event maker, psychedelic music lover, based in Mexico.

artists.title: Hardcore Buddhist
artists.name: Igor Morozov
artists.info_sc: Official website

artists.title: E-Mantra
artists.name: Emanuel Carpus
artists.info_sc: Emanuel Carpus has released fourteen albums as E-Mantra from Constanta, Romania — work spread across Melusine Records, Suntrip Records, and Altar Records, under aliases including E-Mantra, Emanuel Carpus, Neurosect, and Night Hex. An early champion of Goa Trance in Eastern Europe, he brings emotional richness and a sense of outward travel to compositions that have earned him a devoted following over decades.

artists.title: MadeInRealtime
artists.information: Rafaël Campoli aka MadeInRealtime

artists.title: Paracozm
artists.name: Diego Armando Brinker
artists.info_sc: Paracozm is Diego Brinker's project from southern Brazil, named after the psychological concept of a meticulously constructed imaginary world. His music follows that idea into sound — immersive, velvety, and forward-thinking, designed to unlock uncharted dimensions in the listener.

artists.title: Boketto
artists.name: Harry Critchley
artists.info_sc: Harry Critchley makes music in Manchester as Boketto with a straightforward purpose: capturing the divinity of existence through sound.

artists.title: TyStix
artists.name: Tyler Archer
artists.information:
Tyler Archer is an electronic music producer from the Garden Route of Southern Africa, focusing on the ever evolving psychedelic sound, he aims to bring you cutting edge futuristic sound design, and nocturnal sound-scapes, With over 12 years of experience, Tystix has crafted a unique sound within the realm of dark progressive music.

His captivating performances have graced numerous festivals such as Origin (ZA), Modem Teaser Brussels (BE), BomShankar Prod (BE), and Vortex (ZA) to name a few, his performances transcend boundaries, leaving an indelible mark on diverse audiences.

From a young age his fascination grew for experimental and psychedelic music he heard growing up in the local trance community, and after learning to beat match and mix his favorite influences, it was in late 2012 he decided to start learning to produce his own music.
artists.info_sc: Tyler Archer is an electronic music producer from the Garden Route of Southern Africa, crafting dark progressive sound design and nocturnal soundscapes since 2012. He has performed at festivals across Southern Africa and Europe, and his releases span Sentimony Records, Pistolero, Zenon, 2 to 6 Records, MPI Music, Padang Records, and Techgnosis Records.

artists.title: Jai
artists.name: Jai Jagdeesh
artists.info_sc: JAI is a DJ and music producer from Xalapa, Mexico working in psytechno, dark progressive, and glitch — DJing since 2004, producing since 2015. His releases have reached the top of Beatport charts and appeared on Occulta Records, Techgnosis Records, Sentimony Records, and Padang Records, among others.

artists.title: Sourone
artists.name: Michał Kalinowski
artists.info_sc: Michał Kalinowski is a one-person project from Poland, focused on psychedelic and experimental electronic music rooted in IDM and glitch. As Sourone he moves across minimal psychedelic progressive, groovy psytech, and squelchy-glitchy IDM — a range that has taken him to BOOM, OZORA, MODEM, and Freqs of Nature, and on tours to Australia, the United States, Brazil, and Mexico.

artists.title: Frog Prog
artists.name: Andrii Averin
artists.info_sc:
FB @frogyprogy Quantum Digits Recordings / Sentimony Records / Space Baby Record / Mathematician Records / Kunayala Records

BIO Solo project by Andrei Averin (ShivaOm). His sound is like nature chants, where the experience of the past intertwines by its floral shoots with premonitions of the future where the common co-energy of space and time lives. If there is a connection between the colors, musical notes, objects in the solar system and the days of the week, he tried to penetrate into the very essence of colors, tones and vivid paint changes in the mood of each sound of our music. Frog Prog Project is an experiment where minimalist progressive turns into absolutely all colors of the spectrum.

artists.title: Egomorph
artists.name: Andrea Caltabiano
artists.info_sc: Egomorph is Andrea Caltabiano's project, born in 2014 in Verona, hybridising Minimal Techno structures with the psychedelic textures of Psy-Trance into a sound he calls Psytech — with a deliberate edge of horror vibes. He has released on Mau5trap, Zenon, Soupherb, Sentimony, Technophobia, and many others.

artists.title: derotonin
artists.name: Lee Reid
artists.info_sc: Lee Reid makes progressive and psychedelic music from Fremantle, Australia as Derotonin — with releases on Sentimony Records and DenseNebula Records, and at least one very satisfied listener on record.

artists.title: Simon Neumann
artists.information: Simon Neumann (Zeamoon Mastering)

artists.title: Nuada
artists.name: Dylan Ainsworth
artists.style: Psytrance, Psythech, Minimal, Dark Progressive, Zenonesque
artists.info_sc:
Releases on: Sentimony Records Technophobia records

Bookings - dylanjamesainsworth@gmail.com

artists.title: Noob Psybot
artists.name: Aditya Vernekar
artists.info_sc: Aditya Vernekar is a producer and DJ from Bombay who grew up on symphonic music and black metal before psytrance reshaped his direction. As Noob Psybot he works in dark progressive, psygressive, psytech, and dark minimal techno — building broody atmospheres, hypnotic basslines, and deeply perceptive soundscapes.

artists.title: DMnT
artists.name: Raúl Berlanga
artists.info_sc: Raúl Berlanga works as a DJ, producer, and remixer from Mexico under the DMNT name — putting psychedelic music across labels including Zenon Records and Sentimony Records.

artists.title: From Vacuum
artists.name: Serhii Pichkurov
artists.info_sc: Serhii Pichkurov makes atmospheric bass and downtempo glitch music as From Vacuum, based in San Francisco. The name is intentional — vacuum as the space where anything can happen.

artists.title: Akhos
artists.name: Dorian Penin
artists.info_sc: Dorian Penin is a Toulouse-based producer and the label manager of ChronoZone Records, releasing music on Zenon Records and Sentimony Records. He began his psychedelic journey in 2012 with the forest psytrance project Jokester, before launching Akhos as an exploration of techno's untapped psychedelic potential — hypnotic psytechno built on omnipresent atmospheres and captivating grooves.

artists.title: Bensaid
artists.name: Benjamin Garrido
artists.info_sc: Releases: @zenon-records @magic-hour-recordings @our-minds-music @dark-synth-recordings @monsteramusikk @alpakamuzik @soupherb-records @amped-label @techgnosis-records @sentimony @subtrail @visionary-shamanic @quantum-forest @padangrec @katayyrecords @occulta-records @insonitus-records @claroscurorecords

artists.title: Syned Brain
artists.name: Denis Bogdanovski
artists.information: Behind the pseudonym Syned Brain is Denis Bogdanovski from North Macedonia. From a young age, he became interested in music instruments, and later on, he developed an interest in electronic music production. Immediately experimenting, he created his first album in 2009. He delved into a slightly darker style and created his first Syned Brain album under the name Testament. This is a dark psy project with a slightly slower bpm compared to the usual for this style of music.

artists.title: SpaceCraft
artists.name: Eduardo De La Paz
artists.info_sc: Eduardo De La Paz builds psytrance from Guerrero, Mexico as SpaceCraft — dark, glitch-inflected, with tight basslines and atmospheres that feel deliberately outside this reality.

artists.title: Djeriko
artists.name: Djeri Milhose
artists.info_sc: Djeri Milhose makes darkprog, zenonesque, and psytech from Guatemala as Djeriko — three closely related directions in psychedelic music's darker corners.

artists.title: Urklang
artists.name: Fabian Kerschbaum
artists.information:
Urklang is the Solo-Project of Fabian Kerschbaum, Music-Producer, Music-Coach, Mixing & Mastering Engineer, Artist, Art-Therapist and DJ from Austria.

Urklang is a journey through different psychedelic styles and sub-genres from the PsyTrance- World. The main character of his music is the storytelling, zenonesque and deep progressive style which he stands for and makes you travel through different spheres and emotions, through time and space, bringing ancient feelings echoed through different worlds, filled with organic melodies, an intelligent sound-design, psychedelic sounds mixed with glitchy moments and driving basslines.
artists.info_sc: Fabian Kerschbaum works out of Vienna as a music producer, DJ, music coach, and art therapist — releasing music under Urklang on Merkaba Music and Universal Tribe Records.

artists.title: Mushroomslice
artists.info_sc: A Kyiv-based project with an unusual job title: Chief Dispatcher of Quantum Entanglement.

artists.title: Fracktom
artists.name: Luigi Hernandez
artists.info_sc: Luigi Hernandez is the producer behind Fracktom, a dark progressive-glitch project from Mexico's underground. Rooted in experimentation and boundary-pushing sound design, his music fuses dark rhythms and digital textures into immersive, genre-defying experiences.

artists.title: Mirror Me
artists.name: Antoni Girjatowicz
artists.info_sc: Mirror Me operates across Portal Workshop, Anomalistic, Endless Knot, and Voronoiz — a project defined by its affiliations as much as its sound.

artists.title: Jakanatura
artists.name: Lopez Benoît
artists.style: Psytrance, Dark Progressive, Shamanic Bush Prog
artists.information: Jakanatura is Lopez Benoît's 3rd and New project, always more Shamanic, tribal sounds, in a zenon bush prog style. Better known as Krapul his Forest Psytrance project and Sensorythm his Psydub Chill Project, he finds a new craze for creating shamanic sound visions that will take you on a journey to the jungles of the world!
artists.info_sc: Jakanatura is Lopez Benoît's third project from Apt Vaucluse, France — shamanic and tribal textures filtered through a bush prog and zenonesque approach. His other alias, Krapul, handles the forest psytrance side.

artists.title: Dementor
artists.name: Bojan Taneski
artists.information:
Dementor is a progressive forest psytrance project by Bojan Taneski, also known as Zopmanika.

Blending deep psychedelic atmospheres with twisted forest grooves, Dementor explores the mystical edges of sound design, storytelling, and ritual dancefloor energy.

Crafted in the underground and inspired by nature, each set is a journey through hypnotic rhythms and organic chaos.
artists.info_sc: Bojan Taneski is a producer from Ohrid, North Macedonia who started making music at fourteen. Dementor is one of his current projects, running alongside his Goa-oriented outlet Zopmanika.

artists.title: Spirit Architect
artists.name: Angel Zdravkovski
artists.information: Angel Zdravkovski also known as Spirit Architect shown interest in audio production since early ages . Constructing his own sounds and getting the need for better sound make him able to experiment with various techniques over 15 years . Today he is established sound designer and mastering engineer with advanced tools dedicated to sound perfection
artists.info_sc: Spirit Architect is a duo from Skopje, North Macedonia whose first experiments with production go back to 2003. After years of experimentation and formal training as sound engineers, releases followed on Ovnimoon, BMSS, and Geomagnetic Records — before they signed with Dacru Records in 2012 to release their debut full album in 2014.

artists.title: Gribessa (aka Irina Iris)
artists.name: Irina Gribacheva
artists.information: Ukrainian techno and psytrance dj, electronic music lover, based in Poland, Krakow.
artists.info_sc: Irina Gribacheva is a Ukrainian DJ now based in Kraków, Poland, moving between techno and psytrance as Gribessa — and a resident of Sentimony Records.

artists.title: Tairam
artists.name: Maria Tuyau
artists.information: Australian psytrance djane, based in Mauritius & Melbourne.
artists.info_sc: Maria Tuyau is a Melbourne-based DJ navigating psychedelic dark progressive as Tairam, affiliated with Universal Tribe Records and Sentimony Records. Her sets blend earthy rhythms with deep, hypnotic vibes, and have brought her to festivals including Esoteric Festival, Wild Horses Festival, Yumanda Gathering, and Osiris Gathering.

artists.title: Alien Immigrant
artists.name: Maksym Finchuk
artists.information:
Alien Immigrant is an electronic project by Ukrainian multi-instrumentalist Maksym Finchuk, currently based in the United States. His music moves through a wide spectrum of psychedelic sound - from organic psychill and deep psydub textures to darker, forest-inspired psytrance journeys.

Maksym’s fascination with psychedelic music began early, shaped by the raw spirit of The Doors, Pink Floyd, and Jimi Hendrix. Over time, this influence expanded into a deeper exploration of electronic sound, live instrumentation, and altered sonic states.

Blending live recordings, synthetic layers, and cinematic atmospheres, Alien Immigrant creates immersive soundscapes that feel both earthly and otherworldly - a passage through inner visions, strange nature, and sci-fi-tinted dreamworlds.
artists.info_sc:
Something psychedelic.

Alien Immigrant, an electronic project by a Ukrainian multi-instrumentalist Maksym Finchuk, delves into a diverse array of psychedelic genres, spanning organic psychill to forest psytrance.

Maksym’s fascination with psychedelic rock legends such as the Doors, Pink Floyd, and Jimi Hendrix ignited at a young age, gradually expanding into a broader interest in psychedelic sound.

Alien Immigrant’s soundscape is a captivating fusion of live recordings and synthesized sounds, transporting listeners to fantastical and sci-fi-inspired realms.

events.title: Sentimony: Shift Space
events.info:
On an autumn Saturday evening, November 1, you’ll have the opportunity to find yourself under the dome of the starry sky.

At the planetarium, Sentimony Records will present two brand-new releases:

The fifth label release: Spectrum Vision – Lost Space Device.

The author, Ivan Uzdyaev, will arrive from Moscow for a live 90-minute performance.

and

The sixth CD: Irukanji – Z Lisu, from DJ, musician, and Sentimony Records co-founder Ihor Orlovskyi.

A debut chill-out & psy-ambient party featuring three live performances!

Special guest and friend of Sentimony - Chronos (Moscow).

November 1 (Saturday), 2008

19:30 – 23:30 (please arrive 20 minutes before the start)

Sentimony Records presents

its debut evening of psy-ambient & chill-out music:

<<< SENTIMONY: SHIFT SPACE >>>

events.title: Sentimony: Water Marks
events.info:
On the eve of autumn, Sentimony Records invites friends to embark on a water journey.

At the territory of a boat station, we’ll host the first party in our new event series

SENTIMONY: WATER MARKS.

On the night of August 28–29, a picturesque bay near Kyiv will welcome you with music from Senzar (Denmark) and a number of live performances by Ukrainian artists.

The program includes: album and track premieres, debut shows, and collaborative experiments.

For adventurers and restless souls - active recreation on the water: boat rental at affordable prices under the supervision of a rescue team.

Face control, tea and sweets, an inexpensive bar, a cozy dancefloor, open-air cinema, candles, and nature - all to create the comfort and warmth essential for a Saturday chill-out concert.

Open-air night concert at a boat station in the Kyiv suburbs:

August 28 (Saturday), 2010

22:00 – 08:00

va-fantazma.title: VA «Fantazma»
va-fantazma.artists: harax, sphingida, solcast, zymosis, heinali, frans-gosu, ader-project, synchronick
va-fantazma.information:
«Fantazma» is the debut release of Sentimony Records - psychedelic music label, based in Kyiv, Ukraine.

Eleven previously unreleased tracks, carefully selected by Sphingida, ranging from deep ambient to psychedelic idm and more up-tempo chillout music. All this tracks produced in Ukraine.

Sentimony Records was started in autumn 2006. Label's main mission is to release tracks of all the talented artists from Ukraine and other countries.

Feel the Ukrainian psychedelic chillout spirit!

creditsCompact.p: Artwork, Mastered By Synchronick (Don't Panic Records)

va-emptinesses.title: VA «Emptinesses»
va-emptinesses.artists: unstable-elements, sphingida, harax, zymosis, solcast, roof-raiser, heinali, aisaid, alexander-daf, atmik, prok, apivniuk
va-emptinesses.information:
Sentimony Records proudly presents our second release - «Emptinesses» compiled by Sphingida. Carefully selected tracks from masters of chillout vibes.

The compilation describes a saturated voyage into the Emptinesses of ambient and downtempo escapes, atmospheric dreamy melodies with beautiful floating sounds.

Twelve chillout tracks of relaxed down beats and high spirit tunes. A perfect soundtrack to listen to at the crack of dawn, and during peaceful silent sunset.

Consider for a moment! Listen to the beauty of Emptinesses...

sphingida-origin.title: Sphingida «Origin»
sphingida-origin.information:
Sentimony Records proudly presents «Origin» - debut album of Sphingida - psychedelic music project from Kyiv, Ukraine, founded in 2004 by Ihor Orlovskyi (Irukanji) and Julia Levchenko (Zea NeiRula).

With an initial focus on experimenting with different musical instruments and technologies, from 2006 Sphingida started to take part in various psychedelic trance and ambient events.

«Origin» demonstrating a wide range of musical directions with an emphasis on downtempo and easy listening. In each track you will hear a mind-blowing mixture of gentle melodies, rigid synthetic sounds, and dynamic rhythms. Wise merging of styles and creative approach to the music make the sound of Sphingida absolutely unique.

Have a nice trip!

va-true-story.title: VA «True Story»
va-true-story.artists: spectrum-vision, chronos, dagas, astropilot, zymosis, hvoya, liquid-mind, unusual-cosmic-process, frans-gosu, sphingida, unstable-elements, madgentel, taff, sol, harax, prok, reis-mit-scheis, apivniuk, oklapak
va-true-story.information:
Sentimony Records team proudly presents to you, friends, our fourth release - «True Story» compiled by Sphingida.

We cooked for you 12 awesome tracks from artists that you have known from our previous releases... and several new discoveries to please your ear and our hopes. And some well-known names... We wish you'll enjoy this compilation, which guides you through the true story about the adventures of an small Sentimon...

During listening you will be absorbed by classic ambient vibes in the start of journey and with increasing psy-ambient motion, downtempo and expressive uptempo energy.

Have a nice journey!

creditsCompact.p: Artwork By Reis Mit Scheis (Anton Pivniuk & Olya Klapak)

spectrum-vision-lost-space-device.title: Spectrum Vision «Lost Space Device»
spectrum-vision-lost-space-device.information:
Sentimony Records proudly presents «Lost Space Device» - debut album of Spectrum Vision - psychedelic music project from Stupino city Moscow region, Russian Federation, founded in 2004 by Ivan (Ujo) and Alexander (1n0x).

The main focus of «Lost Space Device» is psychedelic downtempo and ambient works distinguished by subtle ethnic themes with deep dimensions and beautiful melodic leads.

Have a nice trip!

irukanji-z-lisu.title: Irukanji «Z Lisu»
irukanji-z-lisu.style: Psychill, Psybient, Glitched, Trippy, Downtempo, Midtempo, Psychedelic Electronica
irukanji-z-lisu.information:
Sentimony Records proudly presents «Z Lisu» (from Ukrainian its mean «From The Forest») - debut album of Irukanji.

Behind this name is standing talented musician and charismatic dj – Ihor Orlovskyi, member of Ukrainian duet Sphingida (2004 - 2008).

Also Ihor Orlovskyi is known as owner of Sentimony Records and its sublables Aqua Deep Music and Lookinglook Records.

Created in 2008 Irukanji combined all experimental ideas and fresh twisted downtempo style. Irukanji is breaking all rules and standing beyond the scope.

In his tracks you will hear crazy conversion between pure psychedelic down beats and mysterious tales.

Have a nice forest journey!

va-ocean-scenes-higher-titans.title: VA «Ocean Scenes: Higher Titans»
va-ocean-scenes-higher-titans.artists: irukanji, cifroteca, overdream, already-maged, roof-raiser, saikozaurus, magmadivers, shivattva, tookytooky, calamus, shiva3, neirula, makus, jet, iorlovskyi, juju
va-ocean-scenes-higher-titans.information:
Sentimony Records is proud to introduce new musical direction more deeper musical appearance, new sublabel - Aqua Deep Music.

The first CD from the future series of releases - Ocean Scenes, was specially made for you to demonstrate the depth of pure psychedelic rhythms and active meditation.

Higher Titans presents 12 previously unreleased tracks compiled by 🇺🇦 Irukanji. All tracks produced by only Ukrainian established composers and promising newcomers.

Have a nice dive!

creditsCompact.p: Artwork By 🇺🇦 Ju Ju & Ihor Orlovskyi
Mastered By 🇺🇦 Makus (Overdream Studio) & Jet (Cifroteca Studio)

senzar-before-the-morning-sun.title: Senzar «Before The Morning Sun»
senzar-before-the-morning-sun.artists: senzar, ariel-electron, erot, nasa, makus, juju
senzar-before-the-morning-sun.information:
Lookinglook Records (new sublabel of Sentimony Records) presents the debut album from Danish artist Senzar, titled «Before The Morning Sun».

Senzar, who also goes by the name of Thoke Thomsen, is one of the most well-known Danish artists within psychedelic chillout. His works has appeared on well-established labels like Kagdilia Records, Yellow Sunshine Explosion, Ajana Records and Zealotry Music, and his music has brought him to play at parties like Full Moon Festival (Germany), VuuV Festival (Germany), Aurora Festival (Greece), Rhythms Of Peace Festival (Morocco), and Tribe of Frog (UK).

As a follower of psychedelic trance music and psychedelic trance parties since 1995, Thoke started DJ'ing and producing in 2002. Always with an open mind for both uplifting melodies and darker atmospheres - from chillout and ambient to progressive trance and darker psychedelic trance, although mostly with emphasis on the peaceful and harmonic effects of chillout.

«Before The Morning Sun» is a rich, colorful journey of mostly relaxing atmospheres, but also more dancefriendly grooves. From deep, melancholic and slowly evolving underwater soundscapes to uplifting, almost Goa-trance-like melodies and grooves inspired by progressive trance, house and breakbeat. This is an album to be enjoyed both in headphones on a clear summer-day, brightening up a cold winter morning, as well as dancing with your eyes closed. It really is a a truly diverse album, and it clearly shines through that Senzar has spent the last two years making it as personal and perfect as possible.

As an added bonus the album also contains remixes by two of Senzar's friends; progressive trance artist N.A.S.A., well-known for his releases on Iboga Records, Iono Music and many more labels, as well as the upcoming Danish artist Erot.

Have a nice flight!

va-time-loop-beyond-borders.information:
Sentimony Records is happy to announce fresh full-length compilation! It's kind of new project from Sentimony team - VA «Time Loop: Beyond Borders» compiled by Zea (NeiRula), starts new series of compilations under name Time Loop. We are happy to introduce you with known projects and a new perspective names from our opinion ;) Hope you will enjoy it!

Time Loop:
A time loop or temporal loop is a common plot device in science fiction (especially in universes where time travel is commonplace) in which time runs normally for a set period (usually a day or a few hours) but then skips back like a broken record. When the time loop 'resets', the memories of most characters are reset (i.e. they forget all that happened). The plot is advanced, however, by having one or more central characters retain their memory or become aware of the loop through deja vu.

Beyond Borders:
Take a journey through universe with your Divine Essence breaking up all borders. Become the ray of light that trickle through your Reality. Spiritual awakening and discover new orbital's. Feel the freshness of alien atmosphere's and dive in to the deepness of space oceans. Take a walk the most mystical forests. Follow the white rabbits and blue bird. Find yourself in twisted reality.

Fascinating an inner journey into profound states of love, inspiration, spiritual meditation, and self-approval!

Relax. Breathe deeply. Open your eyes!

Unusual Cosmic Process, also known under the name of Runar Kristinsson. In 2000 year he started to work as a DJ in one of the Ukrainian nightclubs. But soon he realized that composing music brings him more pleasure than to engage in DJing. In this way, in 2006 he began to write his own music.

Now Runar works under three projects: Psypheric - in genre of psy prog; Optical Report - in genre of progressive; but main one, and the most interesting its his psy-ambient project - Unusual Cosmic Process.

Also project name should be known to chillout music lovers on his two previous releases - VA «True Story» (2008) and VA «Grower» (2010).

Sentimony Records is happy to announce you label's eleventh release - «Special Places» - ambient, modern classical & score music compilation, compositions which have been carefully selected by AstroPilot.

«There is no person without a past, no person without their recollections... Everyone has his own personal place, whether it's a desolate house in the village from childhood, the path you were wandering together with your first love or the bank of the river where you contemplated the break of dawn... Each of us has own place, story and significant memories that we are connected to... Time and again, in our thoughts, memories of the past rush back to us as if it was yesterday and all of a sudden you are still talking to people who are no longer in your life - maybe even no longer alive...»

zymosis-insight.information:
Sentimony Records team is proud to present «Insight» - new Zymosis full-length album.

I was looking for Power, but I did not find anything ...

Then I looked for God, but found nothing ...

Then I looked for myself and did not find anything either.

When my quest for Power, God and Myself merged, I found the Secret:
All that is and all that you know is the One Whole.
Everything that happens is part of a single action, which can be called a single life of the universe. Life is what it is. You can only understand and accept this. And only the Understanding - the pure One Whole Consciousness, which is in the beginning, remains only. This is the only existing reality. All the rest is an illusion, which includes all the variety of phenomena that arise in our perception.
When I realized this, Harmony and Peace found me ...

derotonin-motion-trickness.title: derotonin «Motion Trickness»
derotonin-motion-trickness.information:
Sentimony Records is proud to present a new progressive and zenonesque release titled «Motion Trickness» by derotonin, from Australia.

It’s his second full length release and first within this style and tempo range, highlighting a change in pace for the derotonin project.

Playful and energetic, this release ventures toward the deep dancefloor while maintaining the unmistakable sound of earlier derotonin releases.

Hybridised in its style, the album is part tech, part prog and encompasses a full spectrum of the artist’s creative process triggers and musical motivations.

Driving, psychedelic and packed with intricate sound design, each track aims to build tension over sustained periods, taking the listener on a journey while dodging overly predictable song structures.

«Motion Trickness» by derotonin promises to be a refreshing addition to the dance floor.

Have a nice trip and enjoy!

creditsCompact.p: Artwork By Jessica Eggers

zymosis-memento.title: Zymosis «Memento»
zymosis-memento.information:
Introducing the opportunity to embark on a sonic voyage like never before with Zymosis on vinyl for the very first time!

Experience the ethereal soundscape of «Memento», the latest masterpiece from Ukrainian virtuoso Zymosis, now available as a captivating double vinyl album.

In the realm of philosophy,«memento» resonates with profound depth, embodying the essence of temporal consciousness and existential contemplation. Rooted in the Latin imperative «mementō», translating to «remember», it beckons onlookers towards an introspective odyssey through the transient tapestry of existence, urging the embrace of every fleeting moment.

Featuring 8 mesmerizing narratives, with 2 enchanting tales on each side, this album promises an exhilarating journey through realms of sound and thought.

Prepare for a captivating expedition into the realms of sound and introspection. Bon voyage, and may you savor every moment of this exquisite auditory adventure!

creditsCompact.p: Mastered By 🇺🇦 Dimitro (Zymosis Studio) & Yurii Medved

boketto-pushback.title: Boketto «Pushback» Single
boketto-pushback.relative_releases: va-gatekey-vol-3 va-gatekey-vol-2 boketto-immure boketto-presence boketto-outer boketto-yugen
boketto-pushback.information:
Sentimony Records proudly presents its debut single, alongside the label's first release of Drum & Bass with a pinch of trible and psychedelic vibes by Boketto (UK), titled «Pushback».

With «Pushback», Boketto seeks to encapsulate the emotional journey of humanity, tracing our mysterious origins through to our present evolution.

This release is truly one-of-a-kind, marking the beginning of a new chapter for us: the Psychedelic Drum & Bass (PsyDnB) genre. We’ve already started work on the first PsyDnB compilation featuring talented, psyminded artists. Stay tuned and enjoy the ride!

creditsCompact.p: Written & Produced By 🇬🇧 Harry Critchley (Boketto)

frog-prog-triangulum.title: Frog Prog «Triangulum» EP
frog-prog-triangulum.information:
Sentimony Records is proud to present new dark progressive psytrance release titled «Triangulum» by Frog Prog, from Ukraine.

Triangulum Galaxy - a spiral galaxy located in the constellation of Triangulum. Its name, derived from the Greek word for «triangle,» reinforces the symbolic connection between the geometric form of the triangle and the broader universe.

Each of the three corners of the triangle can be seen as symbolic of key aspects of existence: body, mind, and spirit, or creation, preservation, and destruction. These three aspects are not separate but interconnected, forming a unified whole that reflects the cyclical nature of existence. This interconnectedness of parts mirrors the cosmic order that governs not only the individual but also the continuation of life and lineage across time.

Have a wonderful trip and enjoy!
